# Acme Example API v2

Catalog, inventory, and platform services for the Acme fixture.

## Operations

- [Create a catalog product](operations/createProduct.md)
- [Delete a product](operations/deleteProduct.md)
- [Export an audit batch](operations/exportAuditBatch.md)
- [Get one product](operations/getProduct.md)
- [List catalog products](operations/listProducts.md)
- [Replace a product](operations/updateProduct.md)
- [Upload draft product payloads](operations/uploadDrafts.md)
- [Watch inventory changes](operations/watchInventory.md)
